---
title: "Achievements"
---

## Hackathons

### **Runner-Up - upGrad CodeEd AI Hackathon Grand Finale (Mumbai)**
*October 2025*

*   Secured **Runner-Up** position nationwide in the grand finale of the CodeEd AI Hackathon.
*   Pitched the product vision and business model for **[ElevateEd AI](projects/elevateed.qmd)** (a study kit compiler that targets student knowledge gaps) to a panel of industry leaders.
*   **Technical Details:** Developed FastAPI-based in-memory parsing, automated recursive text summarization pipelines, and Firestore profile serialization. See **[ElevateEd AI Project Details](projects/elevateed.qmd)**.

### **Second Prize - SocioHack Hackathon (IIT Gandhinagar)**
*February 2025*

*   Secured **Second Prize (Runner-up)** in the social problem-solving hackathon hosted by the Technical Council of IIT Gandhinagar in collaboration with Blithchron.
*   Co-created **[3D-Map: Real-Time Event Navigation System](projects/map.qmd)**, an interactive, collaborative 3D spatial web app using React, MapTiler SDK, and Firebase.
*   **Technical Details:** Implemented dynamic Leaflet GeoJSON layer mapping and client-side overlapping marker clustering algorithms. See **[3D Campus Map Project Details](projects/map.qmd)**.

---

## Open Source Contributions

### **Contributor - FOSS Overflow**
*February 2025 - March 2025*

*   Successfully completed a 4-week open-source program organized by the Metis coding club, IIT Gandhinagar.
*   Contributed to **[Leaderboard-Pro](projects/leaderboard_pro.qmd)**, a multi-platform stats aggregator dashboard tracking competitive programming profiles (Codeforces, LeetCode, CodeChef) and GitHub contributions.
*   **Technical Details:** Engineered backend asynchronous scraping tasks using **Celery** and **Redis** to prevent HTTP request blocking. See **[Leaderboard-Pro Project Details](projects/leaderboard_pro.qmd)**.

### **Contributor - Hacktoberfest 2024**
*October 2024*

*   Successfully completed the global open-source challenge.
*   Submitted and merged 6 pull requests (exceeding the baseline requirement of 4) in public JavaScript and frontend web repositories.
*   Demonstrated proficiency in Git, GitHub workflows, code reviews, and remote team collaborations.

---

## Competitive Selections

### **Selected Participant - Amazon ML Summer School (MLSS) 2026**
*July 2026 (Upcoming)*

*   Selected to participate in the prestigious Amazon ML Summer School (MLSS) 2026 program.
*   One of **3,000** candidates selected nationwide from over **1.3 Lakh** applications, representing a top **2.3%** selection rate.
